---
title: "NYC Flights Big Data Analysis"
author: "Thomas Mason"
output:
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(nycflights13)
library(lubridate)
library(cluster)
library(arules)
library(arulesViz)
library(ggplot2)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
# 1. Load and merge datasets
flights_df <- nycflights13::flights %>%
  select(
    year, month, day, dep_delay, arr_delay, carrier,
    air_time, distance, origin, time_hour
  )

weather_df <- nycflights13::weather %>%
  select(
    time_hour,
    temp,
    wind_speed,
    visib
  )

# Merge flight and weather data
df <- flights_df %>%
  left_join(weather_df, by = "time_hour") %>%
  drop_na(dep_delay, arr_delay, air_time, distance, temp, wind_speed, visib) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier = as.factor(carrier),
    month = as.numeric(month),
    delay_cat = case_when(
      arr_delay <= 0 ~ "On Time",
      arr_delay <= 30 ~ "Minor Delay",
      arr_delay > 30 ~ "Major Delay"
    )
  )

# Check structure
str(df$month)
```

```{r}
# 3. Regression analysis
reg_model <- lm(arr_delay ~ dep_delay + air_time + distance +
                  temp + wind_speed + visib + carrier,
                data = df)

summary(reg_model)
```

```{r}
# 4. Clustering
cluster_data <- df %>%
  select(dep_delay, arr_delay, air_time, distance, temp, wind_speed, visib) %>%
  scale()

set.seed(123)
k <- kmeans(cluster_data, centers = 3)

df$cluster <- as.factor(k$cluster)

# Cluster visualization
ggplot(df, aes(arr_delay, dep_delay, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Flight Delay Clusters")
```

```{r}
# 5. Association Rules
df_arules <- df %>% 
  select(delay_cat, carrier) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.factor))

transactions <- as(df_arules, "transactions")

rules <- apriori(transactions, parameter = list(supp = 0.01, conf = 0.5))

inspect(head(rules))
```

```{r}
# 6. Visualizations

# Histogram of arrival delays
ggplot(df, aes(arr_delay)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Arrival Delays", x = "Arrival Delay (minutes)", y = "Count")

# Weather impact on delays
ggplot(df, aes(temp, arr_delay)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.25) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Temperature vs Arrival Delay", x = "Temperature (°F)", y = "Arrival Delay (minutes)")

# Boxplot by month
ggplot(df, aes(factor(month), arr_delay)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Arrival Delay by Month", x = "Month", y = "Arrival Delay (minutes)")

# Average delay by carrier
df %>%
  group_by(carrier) %>%
  summarise(avg_delay = mean(arr_delay, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(avg_delay) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(carrier, avg_delay), y = avg_delay)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Carrier", y = "Average Arrival Delay (minutes)", 
       title = "Average Arrival Delay by Carrier")

# Scatterplot matrix for weather variables vs delays
weather_vars <- df %>%
  select(arr_delay, dep_delay, temp, wind_speed, visib)

GGally::ggpairs(weather_vars) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Correlation Matrix: Delays and Weather Variables")
```
